name: Apple Brickle Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat together the softened cream cheese, brown sugar, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract until well combined.
2. Gently fold in the English Toffee bits until evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
3. Arrange apple slices on serving plates.
4. Serve the Apple Brickle Dip with the sliced apples. Any leftovers can be stored in the refrigerator.
Yield: 2 cups
